attributes.name: South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands

e2ncg8qe4rt.name: HackerRank Angular (Basic) Skills Certification Test
e2ncg8qe4rt.description: It covers topics like MVC Frameworks, Components (Angular, Dynamic, Styling), TypeScript, Two Way Binding and Form Validation
e2ncg8qe4rt.label: Angular

7i5r9l98atp.name: HackerRank Angular (Intermediate) Skills Certification Test
7i5r9l98atp.description: It covers topics like Routing, NgModules, Observables for data transmission and event handling, Dependency Injections, and APIs.
7i5r9l98atp.label: Angular

anl9dshpo83.name: HackerRank C# (Basic) Skills Certification Test
anl9dshpo83.description: This competency area includes understanding the structure of C# programs, types, and Variables, basic OOP, Properties and Indexers, Collections, Exception handling, among others.
anl9dshpo83.label: C#

3j9aq9m2bb9.name: HackerRank Css Skills Certification Test
3j9aq9m2bb9.description: It covers topics like exploring Cascading and Inheritance, exploring text styling fundamentals, understanding the use of layouts in CSS, understand the boxing of elements in CSS, among others.
3j9aq9m2bb9.label: CSS

em2mlq3deag.name: Frontend Developer (React) Role Certification Test
em2mlq3deag.description: It covers topics like React, CSS, and JavaScript.
em2mlq3deag.label: Frontend Developer (React)

as8fkmnapl8.name: HackerRank Go (Intermediate) Skills Certification Test
as8fkmnapl8.description: It include working with functions, pointers, file handling, building web services in Go and error handling.
as8fkmnapl8.label: Go

ci25g4sdapr.name: HackerRank Go (Basic) Skills Certification Test
ci25g4sdapr.description: It covers topics like basic language features of Golang, simple data structures, arrays, maps, data types, and interfaces.
ci25g4sdapr.label: Go

82cj42i90lk.name: HackerRank Java (Basic) Skills Verification Test
82cj42i90lk.description: It will cover basic topics in Java language such as classes, data structures, inheritance, exception handling, etc. You are expected to be proficient in either Java 7 or Java 8.
82cj42i90lk.label: Java

a4rbrfgp0f0.name: HackerRank Javascript (Intermediate) Skills Certification Test
a4rbrfgp0f0.description: It covers topics like Design Patterns, Memory management, concurrency model, and event loops, among others.
a4rbrfgp0f0.label: JavaScript

dff5pp65l92.name: HackerRank JavaScript (Basic) Skills Verification Test
dff5pp65l92.description: It covers topics like, Functions, Currying, Hoisting, Scope, Inheritance, Events and Error Handling.
dff5pp65l92.label: JavaScript

fjfj7g8s6ns.name: HackerRank Node (Basic) Skills Certification Test
fjfj7g8s6ns.description: It covers topics like Package and Modules Management, Callbacks, Event Loop, Event Emitter, Buffers, Streams and File Systems
fjfj7g8s6ns.label: Node

3j9bd50lcf9.name: HackerRank NodeJs (Intermediate) Skills Certification Test
3j9bd50lcf9.description: Understand the concepts behind an Event-Driven Architecture and Concurrency
3j9bd50lcf9.label: Node.js

33gp893pqhs.name: HackerRank Skills Verification Test
33gp893pqhs.description: It covers basic topics of Data Structures (such as Arrays, Strings) and Algorithms (such as Sorting and Searching).
33gp893pqhs.label: Problem Solving

courses.name: Pass the Technical Interview with Python

6ln9g5g0r6f.name: HackerRank Problem Solving (Intermediate) Skills Verification Test
6ln9g5g0r6f.description: It covers topics of Data Structures (such as HashMaps, Stacks and Queues) and Algorithms (such as Optimal Solutions).
6ln9g5g0r6f.label: Problem Solving

ch1k00qp1cn.name: HackerRank Python (Basic) Skills Verification Test
ch1k00qp1cn.description: It covers topics like Scalar Types, Operators and Control Flow, Strings, Collections and Iteration, Modularity, Objects and Types and Classes
ch1k00qp1cn.label: Python

dpk1o0i4i6a.name: HackerRank R (Intermediate) Skills Certification Test
dpk1o0i4i6a.description: It includes slightly advanced concepts of the R programming language such as conditional statements, loops, and functions, writing efficient and readable code, regular expressions in R, data structure manipulations, and times and dates.
dpk1o0i4i6a.label: R

b9doki8argt.name: HackerRank R (Basic) Skills Certification Test
b9doki8argt.description: This competency area includes fundamentals of the R programming language, understanding Data Frames, Packages, and Data Reshaping, using Data interfaces, among others.
b9doki8argt.label: R

f9q17psn62d.name: HackerRank React (Basic) Skills Verification Test
f9q17psn62d.description: React (Basic) It covers topics like Basic Routing, Rendering Elements,State Management (Internal Component State), Handling Events, ES6 and JavaScript and Form Validation.
f9q17psn62d.label: React

md1hiktjtk.description: It covers topics like getting data from an API and process using parameters or paging.
md1hiktjtk.label: Rest API
